projectDescription: Rasa is an enterprise agentic AI platform for building, deploying, and managing reliable conversational AI agents — combining a no-code Studio UI with a developer-first pro-code framework powered by CALM and Maestro orchestration.
keyFeatures: CALM (Conversational AI with Language Models) dialogue system separating language from business logic
Rasa Studio: no-code visual flow builder for building and testing agents
Maestro: multi-agent orchestration engine for coordinating agents, tools, and knowledge
Flows: deterministic, versioned business logic for reliable agent behavior
Custom Actions: Python SDK for integrating APIs, databases, and external services
Rasa MCP Tools: IDE copilot integration via Model Context Protocol
Built-in conversation repair for topic changes, corrections, and interruptions
Multi-LLM routing to balance latency and cost across providers
Conversation Analytics with CSAT, containment, latency, and volume metrics
Voice/IVR support with streaming ASR/TTS and low-latency turn-taking
On-prem, private cloud, and fully managed deployment options
Enterprise security: data sovereignty, air-gapped deployments, Keycloak auth
publicApiSurface: rasa train — train an assistant model
rasa run — start the Rasa server
rasa tools init — set up MCP tools for IDE copilots
rasa tools run --mode stdio — start MCP server
rasa init --template calm — scaffold a new CALM project
rasa studio download <assistant-name> — export Studio project to YAML
Action SDK: Action, Tracker, CollectingDispatcher, SlotSet
flows.yml: flow definition DSL (steps: collect, action, link, call, conditions)
Studio GraphQL API (authenticated via Keycloak Client Credentials)
Conversation Analytics database (direct access for custom dashboards)
